summary.generationPolicy: Ownership is conservative metadata. Runtime selected-talent/passive evidence should remain authoritative; hard filtering is only safe for high-confidence spec-exclusive rows.

notes: Class buckets come from the stable talent id hundreds bucket visible in CTB:3345237628.
Spec selector rows come from the same talent/passive table and are cross-checked with ClassSpecSkillModelProbe.
Spec-exclusive means one spec has strong description/link/skill-pair evidence and the sibling spec does not.
Spec-interaction means a row names or strongly references multiple specs; do not hard-filter it by a single spec.
Class-wide-candidate rows have no current spec evidence. They may be true class talents or unresolved until more game-file bridges are decoded.
Only high-confidence spec-exclusive rows are marked hardFilterEligible; all other rows should keep runtime/evidence gating.
